About the photographer

Hey, I'm Justin.

I'm a journalist and photographer from Arvada, and this summer I'm learning couples photography. I want real sessions with real people, so I'm keeping it donation-based while I build the portfolio.

Sessions are relaxed. I'll find a good spot, we'll figure out the timing, and I'll keep it moving so it doesn't feel awkward. No stiff poses, no over-directed stuff.

If you like what you get, kick me something. If not, no hard feelings. That's really the whole deal.

Location

Denver, Boulder & Arvada, CO

Session length

About an hour, usually

Delivery

Edited photos within one week

Availability

Summer 2025 — limited spots

What to expect

Here's how it goes.

1

Fill out the form

Tell me your names, where you're at, and when works for you. I'll get back to you within 48 hours.

2

We figure out a spot

I'll throw out some ideas or we'll go with somewhere you already have in mind. Golden hour works best but we'll make it work either way.

3

Show up and hang out

About an hour, nothing formal. I'll give you direction when you need it and get out of the way when you don't.

4

Get your photos

Edited gallery within a week. If you're happy with them, a contribution goes a long way toward gear and keeping this going.

Work

A look at what I shoot.

About payment

Pay what you think it's worth.

There's no set price, no minimum and no invoice. After your session, if you want to throw something my way, I appreciate it. If not, that's okay too.

I'm doing this to build experience and a real portfolio, not to run a business. That said, gear isn't cheap and contributions do help me keep shooting.

Most people who are happy with their photos end up somewhere in the $50 to $150 range, but seriously, there's no expectation. Just be cool about it.

"If you like them, kick me something. That's the whole deal."

— Justin Shaw
